title: Treatment and management of schizophrenia
paperName: Paper 3 - Specialist Options: Approaches, Issues and Debates
summary: 9990 Clinical — antipsychotics, CBT, family therapy, and community care for schizophrenia.
learningObjectives: Outline conventional and atypical antipsychotic drugs.
Explain psychological therapies: CBT, family intervention.
Evaluate token economies and community programmes.
Assess ethics, side effects, and cultural appropriateness.

simpleExplanation.title: Living with schizophrenia
simpleExplanation.summary: Treatment combines medication to manage symptoms with therapy and social support — each approach has benefits and significant limitations.
